title: Integrated Information Phi Through Tropical Semiring

analysis.object: T494: Integrated Information Phi Through Tropical Semiring depth analysis

high_phi.description: High Phi systems: richly connected EML-3 networks

tropical_phi.description: Tropical MAX rule: Phi = tropical maximum of information

phi_gap.description: Phi predicts consciousness but not qualia: EML-2 vs EML-inf gap
phi_gap.reason: Phi is EML-2; qualia is EML-inf; IIT misses the gap

no_inverse_phi.description: Tropical no-inverse: Phi cannot be inverted to reconstruct qualia
no_inverse_phi.reason: EML-2 measure cannot invert to EML-inf experience

phi_law.description: T494: Phi is EML-2 measurement of EML-3 integration; cannot bridge to EML-inf qualia; tropical no-inverse explains the hard problem gap in IIT

analysis.theorem: T494: Integrated Information Phi Through Tropical Semiring (S773).

key_theorem: T494: Integrated Information Phi Through Tropical Semiring (S773).
